name: Ubiquiti airFiber Low-Band Duplexer
title: Ubiquiti airFiber Low-Band Duplexer
short_description: Low Channel 10.700-10.955GHz, High Channel 11.200-11.445GHz. The AirFiber 11 Low Band Duplexer, identified by the manufacture part number AF-11-DUP-L, is a critical accessory developed by Ubiquiti Networks, tailored for enhancing the functionality and performance of the AirFiber 11 series. This series is known for its high-capacity, long-distance point-to-point (PtP) wireless backhaul solutions, and the AF-11-DUP-L plays a pivotal role in optimizing these systems for operation in lower frequency bands. Ubiquiti Networks, a company celebrated for its innovative networking solutions, designed the AF-11-DUP-L to meet the demanding requirements of modern wireless networks, ensuring reliability, efficiency, and superior performance.

detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 11 Low Band Duplexer, identified by the manufacture part number AF-11-DUP-L, is a critical accessory developed by Ubiquiti Networks, tailored for enhancing the functionality and performance of the AirFiber 11 series. This series is known for its high-capacity, long-distance point-to-point (PtP) wireless backhaul solutions, and the AF-11-DUP-L plays a pivotal role in optimizing these systems for operation in lower frequency bands. Ubiquiti Networks, a company celebrated for its innovative networking solutions, designed the AF-11-DUP-L to meet the demanding requirements of modern wireless networks, ensuring reliability, efficiency, and superior performance.

The AF-11-DUP-L is engineered to facilitate simultaneous transmission and reception of radio signals through a single antenna system, a process known as duplexing. This capability is crucial for maximizing the efficiency of the frequency spectrum and enhancing the throughput capabilities of the AirFiber 11 series. By focusing on the lower portion of the 11 GHz spectrum, the AF-11-DUP-L addresses the need for reliable, high-performance wireless connectivity in areas where this segment of the spectrum is allocated for use, providing an effective solution for reducing interference and increasing signal clarity.

Constructed with durability and resilience in mind, the AF-11-DUP-L is built to endure the harsh conditions often encountered in outdoor networking environments. Its robust design ensures protection against extreme weather, corrosion, and UV damage, thereby preserving the integrity and extending the lifespan of the AirFiber 11 deployment. Such durability is essential for maintaining consistent performance and reliability over time, making the AF-11-DUP-L a wise investment for any serious network infrastructure.

One of the standout features of the AF-11-DUP-L is its optimization for low-band frequency operation. This specialization allows the device to efficiently utilize the less congested, lower part of the 11 GHz spectrum, thereby enhancing the potential for clearer signal transmission, reduced interference, and improved link stability. These characteristics are vital for achieving the gigabit-level throughput and low-latency communication that the AirFiber 11 series is designed to deliver, making the AF-11-DUP-L an indispensable tool for network operators who require optimal performance in the specified frequency range.

Ease of installation and compatibility are key considerations in the design of the AF-11-DUP-L. It seamlessly integrates with AirFiber 11 series radios, ensuring a straightforward setup process that minimizes deployment time and technical challenges. This user-friendly approach aligns with Ubiquiti Networks' philosophy of making advanced technology accessible and manageable, facilitating quick and efficient network upgrades or deployments.

Moreover, the AF-11-DUP-L incorporates advanced features to fine-tune the performance of the AirFiber 11 series. These include precision filtering to minimize out-of-band noise and ensure clean signal transmission, as well as the capability to handle high power levels for sustained, reliable operation under various conditions. Such features underscore Ubiquiti's attention to detail and commitment to delivering products that meet the exacting demands of high-performance wireless networking.

AirFiber 11 Low Band Duplexer, model AF-11-DUP-L, represents a significant innovation by Ubiquiti Networks, aimed at enhancing the capabilities of the AirFiber 11 series for lower frequency bands. By providing robust, reliable, and efficient duplexing functionality, the AF-11-DUP-L enables network operators to leverage the advanced features of the AirFiber 11 series, achieving superior wireless backhaul performance. This product exemplifies Ubiquiti's dedication to quality, performance, and accessibility, making it a crucial component for any deployment seeking to utilize the lower portion of the 11 GHz spectrum to its fullest potential.
